variants: Lorenzo Giordano currently resides in Springfen Market, where he is making significant advancements in the field of engineering. He was born in Lakefire Settlement and developed his artistic talents at Pineforge College of Art. As an employee of Violet Weight Engineering, Lorenzo is known for his innovative solutions and creative designs. His impressive work in the industry has earned him the prestigious Infinitum Crest, highlighting his dedication and skill.
